commands.review_summary:
The PR updates task-registry maintenance and terminal task updates so backing-session-missing terminal `lost` cron rows can recover from durable cron run logs, with regression tests and a changelog entry.

PR surface: Source +17, Tests +172, Docs +1. Total +190 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main only runs durable cron recovery for active cron tasks and cannot clear an explicit undefined terminal error. The linked issue context also includes live lost-row versus cron-run-history evidence, but I did not run a live current-main repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed because I found no actionable code defect; the remaining blocker is contributor-owned current-head real behavior proof plus maintainer review of the persisted task-state mutation.

target.title: fix(tasks): recover terminal lost cron rows
target.body:
Replaces closed #75036 with the same task-registry fix on a narrow branch.

This keeps only the terminal lost cron recovery change, focused regression coverage, and changelog entry. The previous PR branch had accumulated unrelated generated/runtime changes, so this branch was rebuilt from current main.

## Real behavior proof

Command:

```sh
/opt/homebrew/opt/node/bin/node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/tasks/task-registry.maintenance.issue-60299.test.ts src/tasks/task-registry.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose
```

Verbose result excerpt:

```text
✓ |tasks| src/tasks/task-registry.test.ts > task-registry > clears terminal errors when explicitly updated without an error
✓ |tasks| src/tasks/task-registry.maintenance.issue-60299.test.ts > task-registry maintenance issue #60299 > recovers finished cron tasks from durable run logs before marking them lost
✓ |tasks| src/tasks/task-registry.maintenance.issue-60299.test.ts > task-registry maintenance issue #60299 > recovers terminal lost cron tasks from durable run logs
✓ |tasks| src/tasks/task-registry.maintenance.issue-60299.test.ts > task-registry maintenance issue #60299 > does not recover terminal lost cron tasks without a backing-session error
✓ |tasks| src/tasks/task-registry.maintenance.issue-60299.test.ts > task-registry maintenance issue #60299 > does not recover terminal lost cron tasks with non-backing-session errors

Test Files  2 passed (2)
Tests  89 passed (89)
[test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 5.52s
```

Review follow-up:
- Tightened terminal lost cron recovery to require the `backing session missing` signal.
- Added coverage proving errorless terminal `lost` cron rows are not recovered.
